C/C PURSUANT TO CONTINUANCE HERETOFORE ORDERED. COURT, COUNSEL AND JURY PRESENT AS HERETOFORE. ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TAKEN. PLAINTIFF RESTS. DEFENDANT'S CASE-IN-CHIEF. JURY ADMONISHED AND MATTER CONTINUED TO 13 OCT 00.

C/C PURSUANT TO CONTINUANCE HERETOFORE ORDERED. COURT, COUNSEL AND JURY PRESENT AS HERETOFORE. COURT GIVES PRELIMINARY INSTRUCTIONS. RESPECTIVE COUNSEL PRESENT OPENING AND CLOSING ARGUMENT. COURT GIVES FINAL INSTRUCTIONS. JURY DEPARTS WITH SWORN OFFICER TO DELIBERATE AT 11:00 A.M. THE JURY RETURNS WITH THE VERDICT, TO WIT: COURT AND CAUSE. WE, THE JURY IN THE ABOVE-ENTITLED MATTER, HEREBY FIND IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF DMITRIY KRAVCHENKO AND AGAINST DEFENDANTS JAMES HANKINS AND BUDGET RENT-A-CAR CORPORATION AS FOLLOWS: ECONOMIC DAMAGES $1270. NON- ECONOMIC DAMAGES $2000. TOTAL $3270. DATED: OCTOBER 13, 2000 (SIGNED) LAWRENCE D. MANCHEGO. VERDICT ORDERED RECORDED. EXHIBITS ORDERED WITHDRAWN AND RETURNED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. JURORS THANKED AND EXCUSED. ADJOURNED.
VERDICT PLNTF TRIAL BRIEF JURY INSTRUCTIONS
